channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Opinion column highlights concerns over attack on Senator Osotsi and broader national issues
item.description: This opinion column brings together several public views on current national issues in Kenya, with the most prominent being the condemnation of the brutal attack on Vihiga Senator Godfrey Osotsi in Ki...

item.title: Islamabad private schools accused of failing to implement 10% scholarship quota, causing Rs5–6 billion annual loss
item.description: A report presented before the Islamabad High Court (IHC) has revealed serious non-compliance by private educational institutions (PEIs) in the federal capital regarding the mandatory 10% scholarship q...

item.title: Free Transport in Victoria Shows Limited Impact Compared to NSW During Fuel Price Spike
item.description: Following a sharp rise in fuel prices due to conflict in the Middle East, Victoria and Tasmania introduced free public transport to ease travel costs, while Queensland maintained its 50‑cent flat fare...

item.title: ED Takes I-PAC Director Vinesh Chandel into 10-Day Custody over Money Laundering Allegations
item.description: On Monday, Vinesh Chandel, director at Indian political consultancy I-PAC, was arrested in Delhi by the Enforcement Directorate (ED) in connection with a money laundering case linked to alleged illega...

item.title: Global oil prices rebound above $100 per barrel within four days
item.description: Oil prices have surged back above $100 per barrel just four days after dropping below this threshold. This rapid rebound highlights ongoing volatility in the global energy market, influenced by a comb...

item.title: Karachi faces severe disruption due to unannounced gas supply cuts
item.description: Karachi is currently facing severe inconvenience due to unannounced gas load-shedding, which has disrupted daily life across multiple residential areas. According to reports, the Sui Southern Gas Comp...

item.title: Empowering African Women to Lead Innovation and Value in the Spice Industry
item.description: As Africa celebrates 200 years of modern spice cultivation, particularly in Tanzania’s Zanzibar, there is a big chance to reshape the continent’s role in the global spice market. While Africa produces...

item.title: China Appeals for Stable and Safe Passage in the Strait of Hormuz Amid Rising US-Iran Tensions
item.description: China has urged for the continuous and unimpeded use of the Strait of Hormuz, underlining the importance of keeping this global maritime route open after former US president Donald Trump threatened to...

item.title: Mavrik Bourque Hat Trick Leads Dallas Stars to Comeback Win Against Toronto Maple Leafs
item.description: In a thrilling NHL matchup, Mavrik Bourque recorded his first career hat trick and added an assist as the Dallas Stars overcame two significant deficits to defeat the Toronto Maple Leafs 6-5 on Monday...

item.title: Ombudsman launches inquiry into 26 lawmakers linked to infrastructure misuse
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has launched an official investigation into 26 members of the House of Representatives who are allegedly involved in irregularities related to infrastructure projects funde...

item.title: Bridging Kenya’s maternal health gaps through policy and investment
item.description: The article by health economist Nelson Onyimbi explores how Kenya can strengthen maternal and child healthcare, building on constitutional guarantees under Article 43 that commit the state to ensuring...

item.title: Bangkok Hottie set for strong chance in Warwick Farm midweek race after encouraging Group debut
item.description: Trainer David Payne is optimistic that promising filly Bangkok Hottie can build on her encouraging Group race debut when she lines up in a midweek maiden at Warwick Farm on Wednesday. The filly first ...

item.title: Free State pupil dies during school rugby match; police open inquest
item.description: Free State police have launched an inquest following the tragic death of a 15-year-old learner during a school rugby match in Sasolburg on Friday. The pupil, identified as Nhlakanipho Buthelezi, was a...

item.title: Centre launches CHO mobile app to improve patient management and emergency care
item.description: The Government of India has introduced a mobile application for Community Health Officers (CHOs) aimed at strengthening primary healthcare and emergency response at Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness...

item.title: Democrats Return Swalwell Donations Amid Misconduct Allegations
item.description: Following sexual misconduct allegations, California Representative Eric Swalwell has resigned from Congress, prompting a swift political fallout. His campaign contributions, once widespread among comp...

item.title: Mavrik Bourque leads Dallas Stars comeback to defeat Toronto Maple Leafs 6-5
item.description: In an exciting NHL matchup, the Dallas Stars overcame significant deficits to defeat the Toronto Maple Leafs 6-5 on Monday night. Mavrik Bourque recorded his first NHL hat trick and contributed an ass...

item.title: Tanzanian workers urge government and employers to ease economic strain through salary review and tax relief
item.description: As the cost of living climbs sharply in Tanzania, largely driven by rising global fuel prices and disruptions linked to the conflict involving the United States, Israel, and Iran, workers’ unions are ...

item.title: Iranian LEGO Video Highlights Australia's Refusal to Join US Naval Blockade
item.description: A recent viral video produced by the Iranian-linked outlet Explosive News features LEGO characters representing Australia to highlight the country's decision not to join a US-led naval blockade in the...

item.title: Kericho children seek refuge with grandmother after alleged parental murder-suicide linked to affair
item.description: A deeply painful tragedy has rocked Boito Ward in Konoin, Kericho County, where Faith Chepngeno was allegedly killed by her husband, Nicholas Rotich, before he reportedly took his own life. The shocki...

item.title: CCTV reveals organised night robbery at Mr Bingo’s Nairobi electronics shop worth KSh 16 million losses
item.description: Moses Mwangi, popularly known as Mr Bingo on TikTok, is facing major financial and emotional distress after his electronics shop in Nairobi’s Central Business District was broken into and cleared out ...
